name: Credit for Tax on Prior Transfers

eligibility.description: The decedent must have received property from a transferor whose estate paid federal estate tax, and the deaths must occur within the specified 12-year window.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides an estate tax credit for federal estate taxes paid on property transferred to the decedent from a transferor who died within 10 years before or 2 years after the decedent.
